reviews.comment:
Largas demoras. Siendo socios del ACA , deberían tener surtidores para socios.Con el valor de la cuota.....alguna diferencia habría que tener!!

(Translated by Google)
Long delays. As members of the ACA, they should have member-only pumps. With the membership fee... there should be some difference!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtd1BhU2RnEAE

reviews.comment:
No me explico cómo un lugar con tanto espacio no tenga más de 3 plazas para estacionar y bajar al baño o a comprar algo .. después debo decir que la higiene el orden del lugar es excelente!!

(Translated by Google)
I can't understand how a place with so much space only has 3 parking spaces to go to the bathroom or buy something... I must say, though, that the hygiene and order of the place is excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdjVlN2R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre buena atención y rapidez. Y ofrecen revisión de líquidos y limpieza de cristales, si no tienen mucha demanda. Genial.

(Translated by Google)
Always great service and fast. And they offer fluid checks and windshield cleaning if they're not in high demand. Fantastic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMTZfRGZBEAE
